title: Bjórr system development
summary: Development of an adaptive learning framework, online school and teaching platform designed around different learners, subjects and pathways through knowledge.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on defining the system model, boundaries, structure, workflows or intended operation.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on meaning, recognition, identity, visual language or the designed human experience.
